quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Maintain visual consistency for data display across Lisraya materials.
rules.rule_text: Chart and infographic containers must use a Light Blue (color.tertiary.light_blue = #E6F0F9) panel with uniform rounded corners (radius.infographic.panel = 12px) and a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

quotes: Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only. Placebo/comparator: neutral gray.

rules.intent: Ensure clear, hierarchical color coding that directs focus to critical brand results.
rules.rule_text: Charts must use Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) and Sky Blue (color.secondary.sky_blue = #358CCB) as dominant colors; Sunshine (color.primary.sunshine = #faa31b) and Gold (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) are strictly reserved for highlighting or adding emphasis to key figures or critical data points. Gray is used for placebo or comparator groups.

quotes: Bars and chart icons: rounded, approachable shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Maintain the approachable, patient-friendly visual language of the brand.
rules.rule_text: Bars and icons within charts must utilize rounded, approachable shapes (such as rounded bar tops) rather than sharp, flat edges.

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Enforce structural typographic hierarchy and consistent branding for data visualization headings.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines must be set in ALL CAPS using the Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) color, accompanied by a thin Gold (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) decorative rule placed beneath.

quotes: Statistical callouts: large and bold (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath.

rules.intent: Prioritize high-impact numerical data points and ensure logical visual flow of information.
rules.rule_text: Statistical callouts must emphasize the quantitative figure as the focal hero element (large and bold text), with its supporting descriptive copy stacked directly beneath in a noticeably lighter weight.

quotes: Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Maintain clinical data legibility while keeping regulatory and methodological disclosures visually subordinate to main results.
rules.rule_text: Chart footnotes must be clearly separated from the primary data display and styled in a layout that is noticeably smaller.
